title: IX-44F
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''IX-44F''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Ferret-class reconnaissance vessel|''Ferret''-class reconnaissance vessel]] that was tasked with scanning for the [[Teljkon Vagabond]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-06-30 -->''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
